title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kaido as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fly already, Momo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I-I shall... O-ONCE MY BODY UnFREEZES!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How high up do you think that is?! Even raising my head in this form is daunting...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like I care, you Wimp!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a grown-up now!! How're you still scared of heights?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep your insolent thoughts to yourself! SA-Samural Fear Nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What was the point of getting big?! You're a dragon, right? So fly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know, stop berating me for a moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm in a hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I let Kaido run wild, everyone's done for!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then fly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I realize that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please just wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kagami- Yama!!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Going on the defensive?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Himoro- Girl!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The way you defy me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like you actually believe you're from Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But everyone knows you're my son!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't escape the truth of your blood!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter what you do,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samura! Will NEVER CONSIDER YOU ONE OF THEM!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
